typography.pairing_strategy: Authority and clarity. Outfit for modern, clean headers. IBM Plex Sans for readable dense data. IBM Plex Mono for license plates, time logs, and numeric IDs.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict geometric alignment. Use h-full on bento children so they stretch to fill rows. Left-align dense tabular data.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-[#141414]) with 1px solid border (border-[#262626]). No soft shadows. Sharp and tactical look (rounded-md).
surface_strategies.header_nav: Solid background (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with a hard bottom border (border-b border-[#262626]). No glassmorphism to keep it strictly functional and legible.
surface_strategies.modals_dialogs: Flat dark surface (bg-[#141414]) with a subtle 1px border and a dark overlay (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm).
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#262626] focus:border-[#3B82F6] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#3B82F6] text-white transition-colors

components.buttons: Flat, text-sm font-medium, rounded-md. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200. Secondary: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] text-white hover:bg-[#1F1F1F].
components.tables: Shadcn tables. Dense spacing (py-2 instead of py-4). Hover states on rows (hover:bg-[#141414]). Data cells left-aligned. License plates strictly in monospace badge.
components.badges: Flat background with 10% opacity of status color, 1px solid border of status color, and text of status color. Example: bg-green-500/10 border-green-500 text-green-500.
components.forms: Shadcn forms. Use select for dropdowns, calendar for dates. Labels must be gray-400, inputs must have high contrast text.
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs. Override height if needed. active tab: bg-[#262626] text-white, inactive: text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color changes (e.g., border-[#262626] to border-[#737373]). No scaling/bouncing (keep it tactical).

icons.style: Regular or Duotone for dense dashboards. Use solid for active states.

login_background.description: Black and white photo of a tall modern building. Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) for the login screen background.

fleet_car_1.description: White delivery van. Use as demo data for the 'Frota/Carros da Empresa' photo gallery feature.

fleet_car_2.description: Another white delivery van. Use as secondary demo data for fleet.

person_1.description: Corporate woman headshot. Use for Employee/Visitor demo profile picture.

person_2.description: Corporate man headshot. Use for Director/Driver demo profile picture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the Dark Theme precisely. Do not use pure white backgrounds anywhere except for Primary Call-To-Action buttons.

Implement a Sidebar layout for navigation (Visão Geral, Visitantes, Frota, Funcionários, Diretoria, Configurações). Sidebar should be bg-[#0A0A0A] and main content area bg-[#141414] or vice versa to create depth without borders everywhere.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively (Tables for logs, Dialogs for rapid registration, Tabs for switching views). Override their default white backgrounds with the dark theme colors provided.
For the 'Frota' module, implement a photo gallery grid for vehicles. Use the provided fleet_car image URLs as mock data.
Ensure all data tables (Visitors, Fleet, Employees) have high contrast. Use IBM Plex Mono for License Plates (Placas) and Times/Dates.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows). Example: data-testid='register-visitor-button'.
Status indicators (Access Granted, Pending, Exited) must use the defined status colors with text and a 10% opacity background of the same color for badges.
Install Google Fonts for Outfit (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body), and IBM Plex Mono (Monospace) in the main index.css or tailwind config.
